name: fileAI documents API
description:
This is an API that is aimed to simplify managing documents. If you have any questions about the API that are not covered in the following documentation, please click "Contact the developer" link underneath.
>  Please, be aware that you need API key for accessing the API. You can get API keys through fileAI web-interface in the 'API Keys' section. As soon as you obtain your API key, you should include it in the each API request as an  `access_token` query parameter or `authorization` cookie argument. For example correctly configured url with query parameter will look the following:
  ```
  https://app.file.ai/backend/api/documents/extract?access_token=<YOUR_API_KEY>
  ```
